WPFTweaksActivity.Description: 清除最近的文档、剪贴板和运行历史。

WPFTweaksHiber.Description: Hibernation is really meant for laptops as it saves what's in memory before turning the PC off. It really should never be used.

WPFTweaksWidget.Description: 移除任务栏左下角的烦人小组件。
InvokeScript:
# Sometimes if you dont stop the Widgets process the removal may fail

      Get-Process *Widget* | Stop-Process
      Get-AppxPackage Microsoft.WidgetsPlatformRuntime -AllUsers | Remove-AppxPackage -AllUsers
      Get-AppxPackage MicrosoftWindows.Client.WebExperience -AllUsers | Remove-AppxPackage -AllUsers

      Invoke-WinUtilExplorerUpdate -action "restart"
      Write-Host "Removed widgets"

WPFTweaksRevertStartMenu.Content: 开始菜单旧版布局 - 启用
WPFTweaksRevertStartMenu.Description: Bring back the old Start Menu layout from before the gradual rollout of the new one in 25H2. On newer versions of Windows !!THIS TWEAK WILL NOT WORK!!

WPFTweaksDisableStoreSearch.Content: Microsoft Store推荐搜索结果 - 禁用
WPFTweaksDisableStoreSearch.Description: 在开始菜单搜索应用时将不再显示推荐的Microsoft Store应用。

WPFTweaksServices.Description: Sets some services to Manual startup and adjusts the SvcHostSplitThresholdInKB registry value to better match system memory, which can significantly reduce the number of svchost.exe processes.

WPFTweaksBraveDebloat.Description: 禁用各种烦人功能，如Brave Rewards、Leo AI、加密钱包和VPN。

WPFTweaksDisableWarningForUnsignedRdp.Content: RDP未签名文件警告 - 禁用
WPFTweaksDisableWarningForUnsignedRdp.Description: Disables warnings shown when launching unsigned RDP files introduced with the latest Windows 10 and 11 updates.

WPFTweaksEdgeDebloat.Description: 禁用Edge中的各种遥测选项、弹窗和其他烦人功能。

WPFTweaksConsumerFeatures.Content: 消费体验功能 - 禁用
WPFTweaksConsumerFeatures.Description: Windows will not automatically install any games, third-party apps, or application links from the Windows Store for the signed-in user. Some default Apps will be inaccessible (e.g. Phone Link).

InvokeScript:
# Disable Defender Auto Sample Submission
      Set-MpPreference -SubmitSamplesConsent 2

      # Disable (Connected User Experiences and Telemetry) Service
      Set-Service -Name diagtrack -StartupType Disabled

      # Disable (Windows Error Reporting Manager) Service
      Set-Service -Name wermgr -StartupType Disabled

      # Disable PowerShell 7 telemetry
      [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('POWERSHELL_TELEMETRY_OPTOUT', '1', 'Machine')

      Remove-ItemProperty -Path "HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Siuf\Rules" -Name PeriodInNanoSeconds
UndoScript:
# Enable Defender Auto Sample Submission
      Set-MpPreference -SubmitSamplesConsent 1

      # Enable (Connected User Experiences and Telemetry) Service
      Set-Service -Name diagtrack -StartupType Automatic

      # Enable (Windows Error Reporting Manager) Service
      Set-Service -Name wermgr -StartupType Automatic

      # Enable PowerShell 7 telemetry
      [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('POWERSHELL_TELEMETRY_OPTOUT', '', 'Machine')

WPFTweaksDeliveryOptimization.Description: Stops Windows from using your bandwidth to upload updates to other PCs on the internet or local network.

WPFTweaksRemoveEdge.Description: Uninstalls Microsoft Edge by creating dummy MicrosoftEdge.exe file in the legacy Edge folder. This tricks Windows into unlocking the official Edge uninstaller allowing for a system-level removal.
UndoScript:
Write-Host "Installing Microsoft Edge..."
      winget install Microsoft.Edge --source winget

WPFTweaksUTC.Content: Date & Time - Set Time to UTC
WPFTweaksUTC.Description: Essential for computers that are dual booting. Fixes the time sync with Linux systems.

WPFTweaksRemoveOneDrive.Description: Denies permission to remove OneDrive user files, then uses its own uninstaller to remove it and restores the original permission afterward.
InvokeScript:
# Deny permission to remove OneDrive folder
      icacls $Env:OneDrive /deny "Administrators:(D,DC)"

      Write-Host "Uninstalling OneDrive..."
      Start-Process '$Env:SystemRoot\System32\OneDriveSetup.exe' -ArgumentList '/uninstall' -Wait

      # Some of OneDrive files use explorer, and OneDrive uses FileCoAuth
      Write-Host "Removing leftover OneDrive Files..."

      Stop-Process -Name FileCoAuth,Explorer

      Remove-Item "$Env:LocalAppData\Microsoft\OneDrive" -Recurse -Force
      Remove-Item "$Env:ProgramData\Microsoft OneDrive" -Recurse -Force

      # Grant back permission to access OneDrive folder
      icacls $Env:OneDrive /grant "Administrators:(D,DC)"

      if (-not (Get-ChildItem -Path $Env:OneDrive)) {
          Remove-Item -Path $Env:OneDrive -Recurse
          [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('OneDrive', $null, 'User')
      }

      # Disable OneSyncSvc
      Set-Service -Name OneSyncSvc -StartupType Disabled
UndoScript:
Write-Host "Installing OneDrive"
      winget install Microsoft.Onedrive --source winget

      # Enabled OneSyncSvc
      Set-Service -Name OneSyncSvc -StartupType Automatic

WPFTweaksRemoveHomeAndGallery.Content: File Explorer Home and Gallery - Disable
WPFTweaksRemoveHomeAndGallery.Description: Removes the Home and Gallery from Explorer and sets This PC as default.

WPFTweaksDisplay.Content: Visual Effects - Set to Best Performance
WPFTweaksDisplay.Description: Sets the system preferences to performance. You can do this manually with sysdm.cpl as well.

WPFTweaksReservedStorage.Description: Disables Windows Reserved Storage (7-10 GB held for updates/temp files). Recommended only on small drives. Re-enable before major Windows feature updates to avoid installation failures.

WPFTweaksRestorePoint.Description: Creates a restore point at runtime in case a revert is needed from WinUtil modifications.

WPFTweaksEndTaskOnTaskbar.Content: End Task With Right Click - Enable
WPFTweaksEndTaskOnTaskbar.Description: Enables option to end task when right clicking a program in the taskbar.

WPFTweaksStorage.Description: Storage Sense deletes temp files automatically.

WPFTweaksWindowsAI.Description: Removes and disables all AI features/packages
InvokeScript:
$Appx = (Get-AppxPackage MicrosoftWindows.Client.CoreAI).PackageFullName
      $Sid = (Get-LocalUser $Env:UserName).Sid.Value

      New-Item "HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Appx\AppxAllUserStore\EndOfLife\$Sid\$Appx" -Force

      Get-AppxPackage -AllUsers "*Copilot*" | Remove-AppxPackage -AllUsers
      winget uninstall -e --name "Copilot" --silent --force --accept-source-agreements 2>$null
      Get-AppxPackage -AllUsers Microsoft.MicrosoftOfficeHub | Remove-AppxPackage -AllUsers

      if ($Appx) {
          Remove-AppxPackage $Appx
      }

      Set-Service -Name WSAIFabricSvc -StartupType Disabled
      Disable-WindowsOptionalFeature -FeatureName Recall -Online -NoRestart

      Write-Host "Windows AI Disabled"

WPFTweaksWPBT.Description: If enabled, WPBT allows your computer vendor to execute programs at boot time, such as anti-theft software, software drivers, as well as force install software without user consent. Poses potential security risk.

WPFTweaksRazerBlock.Description: Blocks ALL Razer Software installations. The hardware works fine without any software.

WPFTweaksBlockAdobeNet.Description: Reduces user interruptions by selectively blocking connections to Adobe's activation and telemetry servers. Credit: Ruddernation-Designs
InvokeScript:
$hostsUrl = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri https://github.com/Ruddernation-Designs/Adobe-URL-Block-List/raw/refs/heads/master/hosts
      Add-Content -Path "$Env:SystemRoot\System32\drivers\etc\hosts" -Value $hostsUrl

      ipconfig /flushdns
      Write-Host 'Added Adobe url block list from host file'
UndoScript:
Set-Content "$Env:SystemRoot\System32\drivers\etc\hosts" (
          (Get-Content "$Env:SystemRoot\System32\drivers\etc\hosts") -join "`n" -replace '(?s)#New Ver.*', ''
      )

      ipconfig /flushdns
      Write-Host 'Removed Adobe url block list from host file'

WPFTweaksRightClickMenu.Description: Restores the classic context menu when right-clicking in File Explorer, replacing the simplified Windows 11 version.

WPFTweaksDiskCleanup.Description: Runs Disk Cleanup on Drive C: and removes old Windows Updates.

WPFTweaksIPv46.Description: Setting the IPv4 preference can have latency and security benefits on private networks where IPv6 is not configured.

WPFTweaksTeredo.Description: Teredo network tunneling is an IPv6 feature that can cause additional latency, but may cause problems with some games.
InvokeScript: netsh interface teredo set state disabled
UndoScript: netsh interface teredo set state default

WPFTweaksDisableBGapps.Description: Disables all Microsoft Store apps from running in the background, which has to be done individually since Windows 11.

WPFTweaksDisableFSO.Description: Disables FSO in all applications. NOTE: This will disable Color Management in Exclusive Fullscreen.

WPFTweaksDisableExplorerAutoDiscovery.Content: File Explorer Automatic Folder Discovery - Disable
WPFTweaksDisableExplorerAutoDiscovery.Description: Windows Explorer automatically tries to guess the type of the folder based on its contents, slowing down the browsing experience. WARNING! Will disable File Explorer grouping.
InvokeScript:
# Previously detected folders
      $bags = "HKCU:\Software\Classes\Local Settings\Software\Microsoft\Windows\Shell\Bags"

      # Folder types lookup table
      $bagMRU = "HKCU:\Software\Classes\Local Settings\Software\Microsoft\Windows\Shell\BagMRU"

      # Flush Explorer view database
      Remove-Item -Path $bags -Recurse -Force
      Write-Host "Removed $bags"

      Remove-Item -Path $bagMRU -Recurse -Force
      Write-Host "Removed $bagMRU"

      # Every folder
      $allFolders = "HKCU:\Software\Classes\Local Settings\Software\Microsoft\Windows\Shell\Bags\AllFolders\Shell"

      if (!(Test-Path $allFolders)) {
        New-Item -Path $allFolders -Force
        Write-Host "Created $allFolders"
      }

      # Generic view
      New-ItemProperty -Path $allFolders -Name "FolderType" -Value "NotSpecified" -PropertyType String -Force
      Write-Host "Set FolderType to NotSpecified"

      Write-Host Please sign out and back in, or restart your computer to apply the changes!
UndoScript:
# Previously detected folders
      $bags = "HKCU:\Software\Classes\Local Settings\Software\Microsoft\Windows\Shell\Bags"

      # Folder types lookup table
      $bagMRU = "HKCU:\Software\Classes\Local Settings\Software\Microsoft\Windows\Shell\BagMRU"

      # Flush Explorer view database
      Remove-Item -Path $bags -Recurse -Force
      Write-Host "Removed $bags"

      Remove-Item -Path $bagMRU -Recurse -Force
      Write-Host "Removed $bagMRU"

      Write-Host Please sign out and back in, or restart your computer to apply the changes!

WPFToggleDetailedBSoD.Description: Gives more information when you blue screen.

WPFToggleBatteryPercentage.Description: Shows numeric battery percentage next to the battery icon in the system tray.

WPFToggleDarkMode.Description: 系统和应用的深色模式。

WPFToggleNewOutlook.Description: This will ensures the classic Outlook application is used.

WPFToggleScrollbars.Description: If enabled, scrollbars will always be visible. If disabled, Windows will automatically hide scrollbars when not in use.

WPFToggleMultiplaneOverlay.Description: Multiplane Overlay compose multiple image layers, which can sometimes cause issues with graphics cards.

WPFToggleMouseAcceleration.Description: Makes it so Cursor movement is affected by the speed of your physical mouse movements.

WPFToggleNumLock.Description: Toggle the Num Lock key state when your computer starts.

WPFToggleWindowSnapping.Description: Toggles the window snapping feature when dragging windows.

WPFToggleStandbyFix.Description: Toggles network connectivity during S0 Sleep which is low power idle in modern laptops.

WPFToggleS3Sleep.Description: Toggles between Modern Standby and S3 Sleep, which cuts off power to the CPU while continuing to refresh the memory.

WPFToggleHideSettingsHome.Description: Toggles the Home Page in the Windows Settings app.

WPFToggleBingSearch.Description: Toggles Bing web search results in Windows Search.

WPFToggleLoginBlur.Description: Toggles the acrylic blur effect on login screen background.

WPFTweaksDisableLockscreen.Description: Skips the lock screen entirely and goes directly to the sign-in screen on boot and wake.

WPFToggleStartMenuRecommendations.Description: Toggles the recommendations section in the Start Menu. WARNING: This will also disable Windows Spotlight on your Lock Screen as a side effect.

WPFToggleStickyKeys.Description: Toggles the Sticky Keys, which activate when clicking shift rapidly.

WPFToggleTaskbarAlignment.Description: Toggles the Taskbar alignment either to the left or center.

WPFToggleTaskbarSearch.Description: Toggles the Search Button on the Taskbar.

WPFToggleTaskView.Description: Toggles the Task View Button in the Taskbar.

WPFToggleGameMode.Description: Toggles Windows prioritizes gaming performance by allocating system resources to games.

WPFToggleLongPaths.Description: Toggles support for file paths longer than 260 characters in Explorer.

WPFchangedns.ComboItems: Default DHCP Google Cloudflare Cloudflare_Malware Cloudflare_Malware_Adult Open_DNS Quad9 AdGuard_Ads_Trackers AdGuard_Ads_Trackers_Malware_Adult
